session.user:
Run the following test and report results: uv run pytest tests/unit/artifacts/test_codex_compatibility.py -v
This validates SKILL.md frontmatter and skill registration.
session.assistant: I'll run the test and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on codex compatibility tests
